seoTitle: Castle Doyle vs Castle Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castle Doyle and Castle Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castle Doyle vs Castle Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castle Doyle and Castle Hill.
heading: Castle Doyle vs Castle Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castle Doyle, New South Wales and Castle Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castle Doyle has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Castle Hill (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castle Doyle or Castle Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castle Doyle has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Castle Hill scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castle Doyle scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Hill scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castle Doyle or Castle Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castle Doyle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
